---
title: "Poster"
author: "CSM TraceForce"
date: "June 10, 2026"
toc: false
---

Our ISO A1 conference poster summarises the investigation end to end, from the problem and motivation through the approach, the Shiny application, the findings and future work.

[![CSM TraceForce conference poster, A1 format](images/poster.jpg){fig-align="center" width="68%"}](images/poster_full.jpg)

Click the poster to open it full size, or [download the full-resolution image](images/poster_full.jpg).
